input: Generate a TestNG test class for verifying chart rendering in a navigation application. The chart must load within 3 seconds and display correct ARINC 424 waypoints.
Generate a TestNG suite XML for running smoke and regression suites in parallel with 3 threads.
output:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<!DOCTYPE suite SYSTEM "https://testng.org/testng-1.0.dtd">

<suite name="AutomationSuite" parallel="suites" thread-count="3" verbose="2">

    <listeners>
        <listener class-name="com.automation.listeners.RetryAnalyzer"/>
        <listener class-name="com.automation.reporters.ExtentReportListener"/>
    </listeners>

    <suite-files>
        <suite-file path="suites/smoke-suite.xml"/>
        <suite-file path="suites/regression-suite.xml"/>
    </suite-files>

</suite>
